description: Monitors the suppression or removal of photographs, artifacts, or physical symbols related to erased or uncomfortable histories—especially those linked to racial or systemic injustice.
triggers: museum removes controversial photo without explanation
public art depicting resistance goes missing
historical archives altered to exclude specific communities
examples: Photos of Native protests removed from city archives
Plaque commemorating civil rights martyr disappears overnight
Images of Japanese internment altered or downplayed in textbook

pad.source: inferred from keyword analysis of sensor content
pad.reference: Rosetta Shape Core generate.py — PAD compression layer
